events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Assessment: **fail / critical risk** — an unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers inside violates OSHA 1926.652, which requires a protective system (sloping, shoring, or shielding) at that depth. Immediate actions: evacuate workers, halt work, have a competent person classify soil and approve a protective system plus compliant egress and spoil setback before re-entry.
